title: Indexes causes row to not be fetched
poc: CREATE INDEX i0 ON t0(1) WHERE c0 NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM t0 WHERE ~((('') BETWEEN (t0.c0) AND TRUE));
SELECT ~('' BETWEEN t0.c0 AND TRUE) IS TRUE FROM t0;
key_bug_features: Index on NULL values prevents row fetching
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INTEGER, c2 TEXT, c3 REAL);
CREATE INDEX i1 ON t1(c1) WHERE c2 IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (NULL, 'example', 3.14);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE ~((c1 BETWEEN 1 AND 2) OR (c2 IS NULL));
SELECT ~('' BETWEEN c2 AND c3) IS TRUE FROM t1;
